name: Webhook Inbox
tagline: Gives low-code tools a simple local URL for sending events into BFrost.
description:
A producer worker that accepts JSON webhook posts and publishes each one as a `webhook.event` item on the BFrost Item Bus.

It is designed for low-code automations: configure an optional token, copy the local endpoint into another tool, and let BFrost route incoming events to notifiers, notes, or future publishers.
author: @ccascio

versions.changelog: Initial source-backed release with JSON webhook ingest, optional token config, webhook.event publishing, dashboard view, and low-code README.
